# Apex Prometheus AI - llms.txt
# AI Consulting for Small and Mid-Size Businesses

## About
Apex Prometheus is an AI consulting firm specializing in helping small and mid-size service businesses — particularly trades businesses like painters, plumbers, electricians, HVAC techs, roofers, and general contractors — adopt AI tools and build lean operations.

## Founder
Stan "Slao" LoMonaco — a hands-on business owner who runs a successful construction and painting company in Staten Island, NY. He built his own lean operation using AI and agentic workflows before founding Apex Prometheus.

## Locations
- Staten Island, NY
- Tampa, FL

## Contact
- Email: info@apexprometheus.ai
- Phone: (718) 603-1726

## Services

### Tier 1: AI Foundations ($1.5K-$3K, 2-4 weeks)
For businesses new to AI. Includes AI readiness assessment, tool recommendations, custom SOPs, and team training. Expected ROI: 2-3x in Year 1.

### Tier 2: Workflow Automation ($3K-$10K, 4-8 weeks)
Automates core workflows and integrates systems. Includes workflow analysis, system integrations (CRM, PM, etc.), custom automation for 3 processes, and AI-assisted operations. Expected ROI: 3-5x in Year 1.

### Tier 3: Agentic AI ($10K-$30K+, 8-16 weeks)
Full business transformation. Includes business process re-engineering, custom AI agent development, autonomous workflows, and lean-office transformation. Expected ROI: 5-10x in Year 1.

### Ongoing Support & Advisory (Starting at $980/month)
Retainer for ongoing support, maintenance, and advisory services with priority access and monthly strategy sessions.

## Free Tools

### AI Visibility Score Tool
Free diagnostic tool that analyzes whether AI platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview recommend your business. Provides instant scoring across:
- Overall AI Visibility Score (0-100)
- Platform-specific presence (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI)
- Local SEO strength
- Website health
- Review presence
- Content authority
Includes specific issues found and actionable fixes. Takes 60 seconds. No credit card required.
URL: https://apexprometheus.ai/ai-visibility-score

## Specializations
- AI Visibility Optimization
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- AI-powered workflow automation for trades businesses
- Lean operations consulting
